title: The DigiMeat 3D
description: 3D DigiMeat crop resourcepacks made for The Digimod
body:
# The DigiMeat 3D 
The DigiMeat 3D is a resource pack made for the digimon mod "The Digimod".
## What's The DigiMeat 3D do？
### This resource pack main to change the Digimeat crop from The Digimod into 3D model.
With this resource pack the Digimeat crop can more like the most famous digimon game "Digimon World" series,
you can not only manage your own digimeat farmland (the feature from the mod), but also recreate classic scenes from the video game, but in minecraft.
